ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tourney_year_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tournament year */,
  "tourney_order" INTEGER /* Order of the tournament in the season */,
  "tourney_slug" TEXT /* Slug for the tournament name */,
  "tourney_url_suffix" TEXT /* URL suffix for the tournament results page */,
  "tourney_name" TEXT /* Full name of the tournament */,
  "tourney_location" TEXT /* Location where the tournament is held */,
  "tourney_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "tourney_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "tourney_prize_money" TEXT /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  "tourney_surface" TEXT /* Surface type (e.g., Clay, Grass, Hard) */,
  "tourney_category" TEXT /* Category of the tournament (e.g., Grand Slam, ATP 1000) */,
  "tourney_singles_draw" INTEGER /* Number of players in the singles draw */,
  "tourney_doubles_draw" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the doubles draw */,
  "tourney_singles_winner" TEXT /* ID of the singles winner */,
  "tourney_doubles_winner" TEXT /* ID of the doubles winner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tourney_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_tourney_singles_winner FOREIGN KEY ("tourney_singles_winner") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_tourney_doubles_winner FOREIGN KEY ("tourney_doubles_winner") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "tourney_year_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tournament year */,
  "tourney_round_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament round (e.g., Finals, Semi-Finals) */,
  "round_order" INTEGER /* Order of the round within the tournament */,
  "round_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the round */,
  "round_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the round */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of round (e.g., Singles, Doubles) */,
  "round_description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes about the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_tourney_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("tourney_year_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tourney_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "player_slug" TEXT /* Slug for the player name */,
  "player_country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "player_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "player_hand" TEXT /* Dominant hand of the player (e.g., Right, Left) */,
  "player_backhand" TEXT /* Backhand type (e.g., One-handed, Two-handed) */,
  "player_ranking" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the player */,
  "player_best_ranking" INTEGER /* Best ranking achieved by the player */,
  "player_career_high" INTEGER /* Highest ranking in singles */,
  "player_career_high_doubles" INTEGER /* Highest ranking in doubles */,
  "player_career_titles" INTEGER /* Number of career titles won */,
  "player_career_doubles_titles" INTEGER /* Number of career doubles titles won */,
  "player_career_prize_money" TEXT /* Total career prize money won */,
  "player_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each tournament year
Order of the tournament in the season
URL suffix for the tournament results page
Location where the tournament is held
Total prize money for the tournament
Category of the tournament (e.g., Grand Slam, ATP 1000)
Number of players in the singles draw
Number of teams in the doubles draw
Name of the tournament round (e.g., Finals, Semi-Finals)
Order of the round within the tournament
Additional description or notes about the round
Date of birth of the player
Height of the player in centimeters
Weight of the player in kilograms
Dominant hand of the player (e.g., Right, Left)
Best ranking achieved by the player
Number of career doubles titles won
